business.name: ReliableFix
business.serviceArea: Rochester, NY and nearby towns including Irondequoit, Brighton, Webster, Greece, and Fairport

hero.headline: Trusted & Reliable Handyman Services
hero.description: Rochester's licensed and insured handyman team since 2014. Flat-rate pricing, prompt scheduling, and work done right the first time.

services.title: Home Maintenance
services.shortDescription: Seasonal upkeep and preventive repairs to keep your property in top condition year-round.
services.problem: Small issues left unattended — dripping faucets, sticking doors, worn caulk — quietly grow into costly repairs.
services.solution: Our technicians handle all routine maintenance in a single scheduled visit, fully stocked and ready.
benefits: Seasonal inspection included with every visit

services.title: Plumbing Repairs
services.shortDescription: Faucet replacement, fixture installs, leak repairs, and under-sink work done right.
services.problem: Leaky faucets, slow drains, and running toilets waste water and drive up your utility bills.
services.solution: We diagnose and fix plumbing issues on the same visit using quality materials, tested before we leave.

services.title: Drywall & Painting
services.shortDescription: Drywall patching, skim coating, texture matching, and paint-ready finish work.
services.problem: Holes, cracks, and nail pops in drywall look unprofessional and lower your home's value.
services.solution: We patch, skim, and texture-match your walls so repairs blend in completely — paint-ready same day.
benefits: All patch sizes — small to large

services.title: Carpentry
services.shortDescription: Door repairs, furniture assembly, shelving installation, and wood repairs.
services.problem: Sticking doors, broken hinges, and sagging shelves are daily frustrations that are simple to fix.
services.solution: Our carpenters handle door planing, hinge replacement, custom shelving, and furniture assembly in one visit.

services.title: Electrical
services.shortDescription: Outlet and switch replacement, light fixture installation, and ceiling fan mounting.
services.problem: Flickering lights, dead outlets, and outdated fixtures are safety hazards that need professional attention.
services.solution: We handle all minor electrical work safely and to code — no oversized jobs, just reliable small-task electrical.
benefits: Ceiling fan and light fixture install
GFCI upgrades for kitchens and baths
All work meets NY safety codes

services.title: Flooring
services.shortDescription: Hardwood repair, laminate installation, tile replacement, and vinyl plank fitting.
services.problem: Scratched hardwood, cracked tiles, and lifting laminate are eyesores that get worse if ignored.
services.solution: We repair and replace flooring sections precisely — matching existing material wherever possible.

readySection.title: Ready & Waiting To Assist
bullets: We're fully protected with the correct equipment and insurance
We have all of the regulatory safety certifications required by NY

bestServices.title: Best Services In Town
bestServices.description: From drywall repair to deck restoration, our skilled team handles every job with attention to detail, transparent pricing, and a satisfaction guarantee.

helpSection.title: We're Here To Help
helpSection.description: Our technicians bring an average of 8 years of field experience across multiple trades. Every team member is licensed, insured, and background-checked.

features.text: We're fully protected with the correct equipment and insurance
We have all of the regulatory safety certifications required by NY
On-time scheduling guaranteed every single visit

testimonials.quote: They mounted our TV, patched two drywall holes, and replaced a bathroom faucet all in one visit. Everything done cleanly and the price matched the quote exactly.
testimonials.name: Shona Jones

testimonials.quote: Our front door had been sticking for months. They diagnosed the issue, planed the frame, and it closes perfectly now. Quick, professional, and fairly priced.
testimonials.name: Chris Johnson

testimonials.quote: Hired ReliableFix to assemble a full bedroom set and mount shelving in my new apartment. Finished everything in under three hours. Will not bother with DIY again.
testimonials.name: Lisa Davis

faq.question: What is meant by your best price promise?
faq.answer: We quote a flat rate before any work begins. The price you're quoted is the price you pay — no hidden fees, no hourly surprises. If additional issues are found, we tell you before proceeding.

faq.question: Are your quotes no obligation?
faq.answer: Yes. We provide free estimates for all standard jobs. You're under no obligation to proceed after receiving a quote.

faq.question: Do you offer a warranty for your work?
faq.answer: Yes. All workmanship is backed by a 30-day satisfaction guarantee. If something isn't right, we come back and fix it at no charge.

faq.question: Is there an emergency callout fee?
faq.answer: Same-day and urgent appointments are available at standard flat-rate pricing. We do not add emergency surcharges for standard service calls booked same day.

faq.question: Are you insured?
faq.answer: Yes. ReliableFix carries full general liability insurance and all technicians are background-checked and covered.

faq.question: Do you supply your own materials?
faq.answer: Yes. We bring all tools and standard materials. For specialty items (specific tile, custom hardware), we'll let you know in advance what you'll need to source.

faq.question: What areas do you serve?
faq.answer: We serve Rochester and surrounding Monroe County communities including Irondequoit, Brighton, Webster, Greece, Fairport, Penfield, Pittsford, Victor, Gates, Henrietta, and Chili.

faq.question: How do I book an appointment?
faq.answer: Call us at (585) 331-4721 or use the contact form on our website. We typically confirm within a few hours and offer appointments as soon as next business day.

contact.hours: Mon–Fri: 7:00 AM – 6:00 PM | Sat: 8:00 AM – 3:00 PM
